title: T619, Electronic Transmittal - Canada.ca
content:
## T619, Electronic Transmittal
2026V4 - updated 2026-01-14
- The language code is now a Required field
Version 2 – Updates on acceptable characters tables
Version 3 – Adding information on acceptable characters for the submission reference identification (<sbmt_ref_id></sbmt_ref_id> Space, hyphen and special characters are not accepted)
Version 4 – Adding lines for Sch 74 and 76 for the T5013-FIN coding
To prevent system rejections, please ensure optional fields without values are removed from the XML file.

## T619 applicable to all return types (excluding T5013-FIN)
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Submission xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <Submission xmlns:ccms="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/xmlns/ccms/1-0-0" xmlns:sdt="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/xmlns/sdt/2-2-0" xmlns:ols141="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols141/1-0-1" xmlns:ols2="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols2/1-0-1" xmlns:ols5="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols5/1-0-1" xmlns:ols50="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols50/1-0-1" xmlns:ols52="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols52/1-0-1" xmlns:ols58="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols58/1-0-1" xmlns:ols63="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols63/1-0-1" xmlns:ols65="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols65/1-0-1" xmlns:ols6="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols6/1-0-1" xmlns:ols74="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols74/1-0-1" xmlns:ols75="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols75/1-0-1" xmlns:ols76="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols76/1-0-1" xmlns:ols78="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols78/1-0-1" xmlns:ols8="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols8/1-0-1" xmlns:ols8-1="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols8-1/1-0-1" xmlns:ols9="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/ols9/1-0-1" xmlns:olsbr="http://www.cra-arc.gc.ca/enov/ol/interfaces/efile/partnership/olsbr/1-0-1" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
Note: When completing the T619, provide the Transmitter Account number OR the RepID OR both. Ensure that whichever account number or RepID is used to access the filing portal, the same account or Rep ID must be entered in the T619.
<TransmitterAccountNumber> Transmitter CRA Account Number - Required up to 15 alphanumeric (if signed in using My business account (MyBA) or Web access code (WAC)) - Can be a BN9 account, BN15 account, Trust account or NR4 account, depending on the electronic filing portal used - Choose one of the following;
<bn9></bn9> - 9 numeric, example: 000000000 - Can only be used if signed in using MyBA - If signed in with a WAC, use <bn15></bn15>
<bn15></bn15> - 15 alphanumeric; 9 numeric, 2 alpha (must be upper case) and 4 numeric (example 000000000 RP 0000, or 000000000 RZ 0000) - Must be the same BN15 as the one used to sign in with a WAC or MyBA
<trust></trust> - 1 alpha (must be upper case), 8 numeric, example: T 00000000
<nr4></nr4> - 3 alpha (must be upper case), 6 numeric, example: AAA000000
</TransmitterAccountNumber>
<RepID></RepID> Transmitter RepID (Representative Identifier) - Required (if logged in using Represent a client (RAC) application) - Up to 7 alphanumeric
<sbmt_ref_id></sbmt_ref_id> Submission Reference Identification - Up to 8 alphanumeric - Space, hyphen and special characters are not accepted Note: This is a unique number created by the transmitter to identify each submission filed to CRA.
<summ_cnt></summ_cnt> Summary Count - Up to 6 numeric - Total number of summary records produced on this electronic filing.
<lang_cd></lang_cd> Language code - Required 1 alpha - E = English - F = French
<l1_nm></l1_nm> Transmitter name - Up to 35 alphanumeric - Acceptable characters
<TransmitterCountryCode></TransmitterCountryCode> Transmitter Country Code - Required 3 alpha - CAN for Canada - USA for the United States of America - Country in which the transmitter is located. Use the alphabetic country codes as outlined in the International Standard (ISO) 3166 - Codes for the Representation of Names of Countries.
<cntc_nm></cntc_nm> Transmitter Contact Name - Required , up to 35 alphanumeric - Contact's first name followed by surname. Do not include titles (for example, Mr. or Mrs.) - Acceptable characters
<cntc_area_cd></cntc_area_cd> Transmitter Contact Area Code - Required 3 numeric
<cntc_phn_nbr></cntc_phn_nbr> Transmitter Contact Telephone Number - Required 3 numeric, followed by (-) and 4 numeric.
<cntc_extn_nbr></cntc_extn_nbr> Transmitter Contact Extension Number - Up to 12 numeric
<cntc_email_area></cntc_email_area> Transmitter Contact Email - Required , up to 60 alphanumeric - Acceptable characters
<sec_cntc_email_area></sec_cntc_email_area> Transmitter Second Contact Email - Up to 60 alphanumeric - Acceptable characters
Note: All returns to be filed in this submission must be the same return type (ex; Only T4 information return types) and would be included at this point in the XML document. The T5013-FIN and T5013 information return (slips and summary) must be submitted separately.
See XML specifications to file electronically for a list of specifications that apply to your return.
Note: The email address(es) provided on the T619 will be used to facilitate communication regarding the processing of information returns received, as well as to provide relevant updates related to the electronic filing of information returns.
